title: dioscorea tarijensis
intro: Dioscorea tarijensis is a species of the Dioscoreaceae family, commonly known as the yam family, and is a type of wild yam native to Bolivia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including diosgenin, which is a naturally occurring steroid that has been used to develop various medications. The health benefits of Dioscorea tarijensis include its ability to aid in the regulation of blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Dioscorea tarijensis is often prepared as an herbal supplement or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
